description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.10-alpine Docker image (with python:3.9-alpine for the python3.9 jobs) and a global before_script that runs apk update && apk add curl, downloads get-pip.py via curl, executes python get-pip.py, and installs tox quietly. Define three stages: test, pre-release, and release. In the test stage add a flake8 job that runs tox -e flake8 and a coverage job that runs tox -e coverage-report, uses the coverage regex /TOTAL.*\s+(\d+\.?\d+?)\%/, and stores .coverage* artifacts for 1 hour; in the pre-release stage add python3.10-django3.2, python3.10-django4.0, python3.10-djangomaster (allow_failure), python3.9-django3.2, and python3.9-django4.0 jobs each executing tox -e <env> with the same artifact settings; in the release stage add a release job that runs only on tags, installs wheel and twine, builds wheels and source with python setup.py bdist_wheel sdist, and uploads the dist/* files to PyPI via twine using the TWINE_USERNAME and TWINE_PASSWORD variables.
